list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT m.activity FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m ORDER BY 1;

list.name: vo
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT m.vo FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT m.site FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.vo = '${vo:text}') ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.site_id) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.vo = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.site = '${site:text}');

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.activity) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.vo = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.site = '${site:text}');

SELECT ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(m.energy_wh,0)))::numeric,3) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.vo = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.site = '${site:text}');

SELECT SUM(COALESCE(m.records,0)) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.vo = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.site = '${site:text}');

SELECT ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(m.cfp_g,0)))::numeric, 3) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.vo = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.site = '${site:text}');

SELECT m.activity AS site_type, SUM(COALESCE(m.records,0)) AS events, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(m.energy_wh,0)))::numeric,3) AS energy_wh FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.vo = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.site = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY energy_wh DESC;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.bucket_15m, $__interval), SUM(COALESCE(m.energy_wh,0)) AS energy_wh, SUM(COALESCE(m.cfp_g,0)) AS cfp_g FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.vo = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.site = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(m.ncores,0)),0)::numeric / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(m.records,0)),0),0)),3) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.vo = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.site = '${site:text}');

SELECT ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(m.work,0)))::numeric,3) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.vo = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.site = '${site:text}');

panels.title: Sites in Selected VO (click site for monitoring detail)

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.site AS site, m.activity AS site_type, SUM(COALESCE(m.records,0)) AS records, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(m.energy_wh,0)))::numeric,3) AS energy_wh, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(m.cfp_g,0)))::numeric,3) AS cfp_g FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('${vo:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.vo = '${vo:text}') AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.site = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY energy_wh DESC;
